audiences.answer: Performance Report gives you a ready-made weekly review with 6 tabs and AI insights. Pulse monitors every shift in real-time. Sundae Intelligence lets you ask any question in plain English. No spreadsheets, no waiting.
audiences.pain: I have data in five different systems. I make most decisions on gut feel because pulling reports takes hours.

audiences.answer: Pulse Wallboard shows every outlet on one screen with auto-rotating TV mode. Portfolio Leaderboard ranks outlets by revenue, target %, labor %, with streak tracking. Exception Hub consolidates all 8 alert types across all locations. Benchmark shows how each outlet compares to peers.
audiences.pain: I manage 15 outlets and can't be everywhere. I only find out about problems in the weekly P&L.

audiences.answer: Pulse AI Coach delivers shift-scoped coaching signals with confidence levels and talking points. Playbooks codify best-practice responses. Exception alerts catch what managers miss. Scorecard provides end-of-shift accountability.
audiences.pain: Our best managers recover slow shifts. Our worst managers watch them happen.

audiences.answer: 12 Insights modules deliver domain-specific analytics with Module Health Scores. Profit Intelligence combines labor + inventory for prime cost and break-even analysis. Revenue Assurance flags void, discount, and cash anomalies. Benchmark provides industry positioning with RevPASH percentile rankings.
audiences.pain: I spend 3 days assembling monthly reports from different systems to understand what happened.

audiences.answer: Decision Intelligence platform — not a point solution. Spans 12 data domains across 6 intelligence layers with 16 Pulse sub-pages, 12 Insights modules, 7 Benchmark sections, 4 Watchtower sections. AI layer with 15 routes and conversational data access. Network-effect benchmarking. 179+ data models, 200+ services. No competitor plays in Decision Intelligence for restaurants.
audiences.pain: How is this different from Toast Analytics or Restaurant365?

audiences.answer: Report Lite starts at $0 with performance reports, 400 AI credits, and document ingestion. Report Plus at $79/mo adds multi-location and 5 AI seats. Add only the modules you need — Guest Experience starts at $99/mo, Revenue Assurance at $109/mo.
audiences.pain: I can't afford an enterprise system but I need more than my POS dashboard gives me.

differentiators.description: Only Decision Intelligence platform spanning 12 data domains, 6 intelligence layers, 12 analytics modules, and conversational AI
differentiators.title: Breadth

differentiators.description: Pulse with 16 sub-pages, 8 exception evaluators, and compound detection (death spiral, leakage drag) — no competitor has same-shift intelligence
differentiators.title: Real-time

differentiators.description: Benchmark creates a data moat — every new restaurant makes benchmarks more valuable for everyone. This is the STR model that built a $450M business in hotels.
differentiators.title: Network effect

differentiators.description: Sundae Intelligence with NL-to-SQL, 10 AI chat modes, 1.1MB prompt library — democratizes data access beyond analysts
differentiators.title: Conversational AI

differentiators.description: $0 free tier to $349+ enterprise with 12 purchasable modules and 6 bundles — operators buy what they need, expand as they grow
differentiators.title: Modular pricing
